psalm-118-1.verse:
Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good;
  For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
psalm-118-1.prayer: Lord, I give thanks to You because You are good. Thank You that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-118-2.verse:
Oh let Israel say,
  “His lovingkindness is everlasting.”
psalm-118-2.prayer: Father, let Your people declare Your faithful love. Help my life testify that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-118-3.verse:
Oh let the house of Aaron say,
  “His lovingkindness is everlasting.”
psalm-118-3.prayer: Lord, let those who serve You remember and proclaim that Your mercy and covenant love never fail.

psalm-118-4.verse:
Oh let those who fear the Lord say,
  “His lovingkindness is everlasting.”
psalm-118-4.prayer: Father, teach me to fear You with reverence and trust. Let my heart declare that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-118-5.verse:
From my distress I called upon the Lord;
  The Lord answered me and set me in a large place.
psalm-118-5.prayer: Lord, when I am in distress, help me call upon You. Thank You for answering and bringing me into freedom.

psalm-118-6.verse:
The Lord is for me; I will not fear;
  What can man do to me?
psalm-118-6.prayer: Father, You are for me, so I will not fear. Help me trust You more than anything people can do.

psalm-118-7.verse:
The Lord is for me among those who help me;
  Therefore I will look with satisfaction on those who hate me.
psalm-118-7.prayer: Lord, thank You for being my helper. Strengthen my confidence in Your protection and faithfulness.

psalm-118-8.verse:
It is better to take refuge in the Lord
  Than to trust in man.
psalm-118-8.prayer: Father, teach me to take refuge in You rather than placing my trust in people.

psalm-118-9.verse:
It is better to take refuge in the Lord
  Than to trust in princes.
psalm-118-9.prayer: Lord, help me trust You above leaders, systems, influence, or human strength.

psalm-118-10.verse:
All nations surrounded me;
  In the name of the Lord I will surely cut them off.
psalm-118-10.prayer: Father, when opposition surrounds me, help me stand in the power and protection of Your name.

psalm-118-11.verse:
They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me;
  In the name of the Lord I will surely cut them off.
psalm-118-11.prayer: Lord, when pressure comes from every side, remind me that Your name is my defense and strength.

psalm-118-12.prayer: Father, when trouble feels overwhelming, help me trust that it will not overcome Your power.

psalm-118-13.verse:
You pushed me violently so that I was falling,
  But the Lord helped me.
psalm-118-13.prayer: Lord, when I am pushed hard and feel like falling, thank You for being my help.

psalm-118-14.verse:
The Lord is my strength and song,
  And He has become my salvation.
psalm-118-14.prayer: Father, You are my strength and song, and You have become my salvation. Fill my heart with praise.

psalm-118-15.verse:
The sound of joyful shouting and salvation is in the tents of the righteous;
  The right hand of the Lord does valiantly.
psalm-118-15.prayer: Lord, let songs of joy and victory be heard in my life because Your right hand acts with power.

psalm-118-16.verse:
The right hand of the Lord is exalted;
  The right hand of the Lord does valiantly.
psalm-118-16.prayer: Father, Your right hand is exalted and does valiantly. Help me trust Your mighty works.

psalm-118-17.verse:
I will not die, but live,
  And tell of the works of the Lord.
psalm-118-17.prayer: Lord, help me live and not give in to despair, so I may tell of Your works and faithfulness.

psalm-118-18.verse:
The Lord has disciplined me severely,
  But He has not given me over to death.
psalm-118-18.prayer: Father, when You discipline me, help me receive correction with humility and trust Your restoring purpose.

psalm-118-19.verse:
Open to me the gates of righteousness;
  I shall enter through them, I shall give thanks to the Lord.
psalm-118-19.prayer: Lord, open the gates of righteousness so I may enter with thanksgiving and praise Your name.

psalm-118-20.verse:
This is the gate of the Lord;
  The righteous will enter through it.
psalm-118-20.prayer: Father, help me walk through the gate of righteousness with a heart that belongs to You.

psalm-118-21.verse:
I shall give thanks to You, for You have answered me,
  And You have become my salvation.
psalm-118-21.prayer: Lord, I thank You for answering me and becoming my salvation.

psalm-118-22.verse:
The stone which the builders rejected
  Has become the chief corner stone.
psalm-118-22.prayer: Father, thank You that the stone rejected by people became the chief cornerstone. Help me build my life on Christ.

psalm-118-23.verse:
This is the Lord’s doing;
  It is marvelous in our eyes.
psalm-118-23.prayer: Lord, this is Your doing, and it is marvelous in my eyes. Help me recognize Your hand with wonder and faith.

psalm-118-24.verse:
This is the day which the Lord has made;
  Let us rejoice and be glad in it.
psalm-118-24.prayer: Father, this is the day You have made. Help me rejoice and be glad in it.

psalm-118-25.verse:
O Lord, do save, we beseech You;
  O Lord, we beseech You, do send prosperity!
psalm-118-25.prayer: Lord, save now and bring success according to Your will. Lead me in Your blessing and purpose.

psalm-118-26.verse:
Blessed is the one who comes in the name of the Lord;
  We have blessed you from the house of the Lord.
psalm-118-26.prayer: Father, blessed is the One who comes in Your name. Help me welcome Your presence with worship and reverence.

psalm-118-27.verse:
The Lord is God, and He has given us light;
  Bind the festival sacrifice with cords to the horns of the altar.
psalm-118-27.prayer: Lord, You are God and You have given us light. Lead me in joyful worship and surrendered devotion.

psalm-118-28.verse:
You are my God, and I give thanks to You;
  You are my God, I extol You.
psalm-118-28.prayer: Father, You are my God, and I give thanks to You. I exalt You with all my heart.

psalm-118-29.verse:
Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good;
  For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
psalm-118-29.prayer: Lord, I give thanks to You because You are good, and Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-118-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your goodness, salvation, strength, and enduring lovingkindness. When I am distressed, surrounded, corrected, or afraid, help me take refuge in You and trust Your name. Teach me to rejoice in the day You have made, build my life on Christ the cornerstone, and enter Your presence with thanksgiving. May my life continually declare that You are good and that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
